implementTooltip: Starts an implementation run. The agent may change the managed worktree and submits an implementation draft for manual delivery.
reviewOnlyTooltip: Starts a read-only analysis run. The agent should inspect and summarize without making implementation changes.
autoPrTooltip: Starts an implementation run with Auto {{target}} delivery. Oratorio attempts to commit, push, and create a {{longTarget}} after the draft is submitted.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: A compact source brief for board triage.

result.title: Result
result.description: Agent outputs ready for operator review.

reviewAgentDraft.label: Review agent draft
reviewAgentDraft.description: Agent review output needs operator judgment.

viewComments.label: View comments
viewComments.description: Open the review discussion and feedback composer.

recordDecision.label: Record decision
recordDecision.description: Review is ready for an operator decision.

drawerDecision.title: Review decision
drawerDecision.description: Close this review from the drawer, or open the detail page for the full audit trail.
drawerDecision.requestChangesAria: Request changes from the task drawer
drawerDecision.requestChangesPlaceholder: Describe what needs to change before this can be accepted.
drawerDecision.rejectAria: Confirm rejection from the task drawer
drawerDecision.rejectDescription: This closes the current round as rejected until the task is reopened.
drawerDecision.rejectNotePlaceholder: Optional context for why this is rejected.

artifacts.title: Review artifacts
artifacts.description: Open the detail panel to review drafts, follow-ups, comments, and decisions.
